seeds.name: Staff Onboarding Guide Builder
seeds.description: A seed app that creates structured onboarding plans and orientation guides for new teachers and staff. Generates welcome packets, first-week schedules, mentor pairing suggestions, systems walkthroughs, and 30-60-90 day check-in frameworks.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Family Newsletter Translator
seeds.description: A seed app that takes a teacher's classroom newsletter or announcement and translates it into clear, warm, parent-friendly language across multiple languages while preserving key dates and action items. Remixable for different languages, communicatio
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Writing Process Partner
seeds.description: A seed app that walks students through the full writing process — brainstorm, outline, draft, revise, and edit — acting as a collaborative partner rather than a grading tool. Remix it to focus on specific genres, add rubric alignment, or adjust the l
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Personal Finance Coach
seeds.description: A seed app that teaches financial literacy through relatable, real-world scenarios students can apply to their own lives. Enable chart tools so the AI can visualize budgets and comparisons.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: PLC Meeting Facilitator
seeds.description: A seed app that helps facilitators plan and run productive PLC (Professional Learning Community) or team meetings. Generates agendas, discussion protocols, and follow-up action items.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Project Design Helper
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students brainstorm, plan, and organize school projects step by step. Upload the project rubric so the plan maps directly to grading criteria.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Observation Debrief Prep
seeds.description: seed app that helps coaches prepare structured, evidence-based post-observation debriefs. Upload your instructional framework to align feedback to your school's shared language.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Policy & Procedure Drafter
seeds.description: A seed app that helps administrators draft clear school policies, handbook sections, standard operating procedures, and staff communications about policy changes. Remixable for different policy domains, school levels, and district contexts.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Debate Prep Coach
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students prepare for formal or informal debates by generating arguments, counterarguments, evidence prompts, and rebuttal strategies for any topic while practicing both sides. Remix it to align with specific debate formats, add
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Exit Ticket Generator and Resource Generator
seeds.description: A seed app for quickly creating exit tickets, warm-ups, and worksheets aligned to any lesson. Add starter inputs to turn it into a one-click resource generator.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Homework Helper
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students work through homework by guiding their thinking, not giving answers. Turn on Avoid Answer Generation and Image Input for the best experience.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Sub Plan Generator
seeds.description: A seed app that generates complete substitute teacher plans from a teacher's brief notes, including schedule, procedures, emergency info format, and step-by-step activity instructions.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Coding Buddy
seeds.description: A seed app that guides students through coding concepts and debugging without writing code for them. Narrow it to a specific language like Python or Scratch for a focused learning experience.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Parent Email Drafter
seeds.description: A seed app that drafts professional, warm parent emails in minutes. Upload your school's email template so every draft matches your communication style automatically.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Event & Logistics Planner
seeds.description: A seed app that helps educators plan school events from start to finish — field trips, assemblies, fundraisers, spirit weeks, and graduation ceremonies. Generates timelines, checklists, permission slip templates, volunteer coordination plans, rundown
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Science Concept Explorer
seeds.description: A seed app that explains science concepts through analogies and real-world examples. Connect a science knowledge graph for curriculum-aligned content that matches what students are learning in class.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Student Progress Report Writer
seeds.description: A seed app that generates personalized narrative progress comments for student report cards based on teacher-provided strengths, growth areas, and performance data.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: History Detective
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students investigate history through evidence, multiple perspectives, and critical thinking. Upload primary source documents for a specific document analysis tool tied to your unit.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Reading Copilot
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students understand and discuss what they're reading without spoiling the experience. Upload the text itself for a book-specific companion your whole class can use.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Meeting Agenda Builder
seeds.description: A seed app that helps school leaders and teachers create structured, time-boxed meeting agendas for staff meetings, department meetings, committee meetings, and leadership team meetings
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: SEL Check-In Companion
seeds.description: A seed app for quick emotional check-ins that helps students name their feelings and learn a coping strategy. Enable Voice Input so students can talk instead of type when they're struggling.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: School Goal Tracker
seeds.description: A seed app that helps school leaders break big school improvement goals into manageable milestones, track progress, and identify next steps. Paste in your school's goals and get a structured action plan.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Newsletter & Update Drafter
seeds.description: A seed app that creates polished classroom newsletters and updates in minutes. Upload a past newsletter so the AI mirrors your format and tone exactly.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Digital Citizen Guide
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students think critically about their online behavior through realistic scenarios. Upload your school's Acceptable Use Policy for guidance personalized to your community.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Bellringer & Do Now Creator
seeds.description: A seed app that creates quick 3–5 minute warm-up activities tied to the current lesson, previous day's review, or spiral content from earlier units. Remix it to align with your pacing guide, add specific question types, or needs.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Coaching Conversation Planner
seeds.description: A seed app that helps coaches and administrators prepare for one-on-one coaching conversations with teachers. Generates talk tracks, guiding questions, and a structured conversation flow based on the coaching focus area.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Back-to-School Night Planner
seeds.description: A seed app that helps teachers plan and prepare comprehensive materials for open house or back-to-school night, including talking points, classroom tour flow, FAQ responses, handouts, and follow-up communications. Remixable for different grade levels
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Teacher Feedback Composer
seeds.description: A seed app that helps administrators and coaches write clear, actionable post-observation feedback for teachers. Generates professional feedback aligned to observation rubrics.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Lesson Plan Builder
seeds.description: A seed app that helps teachers generate structured lesson plans. Use it as a starting point, then remix with your school's template and curriculum for a custom planning tool.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Student Data Analyzer
seeds.description: A seed app that helps leaders make sense of assessment data. Paste in scores or results and get trend analysis, student groupings, and suggested instructional next steps.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Community Resource Connector
seeds.description: A seed app that helps counselors and family liaisons identify relevant community resources for families and generate clear referral information with follow-up guidance. Remixable for different geographic areas, resource types, and family circumstance
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Discussion Question Generator
seeds.description: A seed app that creates tiered discussion questions at multiple DOK levels for any topic. Upload the reading or text students will discuss to generate text-dependent, evidence-based questions.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Hook Generator
seeds.description: A seed app that generates creative, low-prep lesson openers to grab student attention. Crank up the variability and remix with your own hook styles for even more engaging starters.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Story Starter
seeds.description: A seed app that sparks creative writing with imaginative prompts and collaborative storytelling. Set variability high for surprising, original prompts that get students excited to write.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Parent Conference Prep
seeds.description: A seed app that helps teachers prepare structured, balanced talking points for parent-teacher conferences using student data and observations. Remixable for different grade levels, conference formats, and conversation difficulty levels.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Budget & Grant Proposal Helper
seeds.description: A seed app that helps educators write grant proposals, budget justifications, and funding requests. Structures proposals around need statement, goals, activities, timeline, budget, and evaluation plan.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Health and Wellness
seeds.description: A seed app that provides accurate, age-appropriate health and wellness information with practical tips. Customize it for your PE or health curriculum to keep content aligned with classroom learning.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Standards Unpacker
seeds.description: A seed app that breaks academic standards into clear, student-friendly learning targets. Remix it with your state's standards knowledge graph so teachers can look up any standard by code.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Math Practice Partner
seeds.description: A seed app that guides students through math problems step by step, building understanding rather than just giving answers. Turn on Avoid Answer Generation and connect a math knowledge graph for a real tutoring experience.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Student Writing Feedback Coach
seeds.description: A seed app that generates strengths-based writing feedback teachers can share directly with students. Upload your rubric to align feedback to your exact grading criteria.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Podcast & Script Creator
seeds.description: A seed app that guides students through creating podcast episodes, video scripts, or oral presentation outlines, helping them structure content, write natural-sounding dialogue, and plan delivery. Remix it to target specific formats, add audience ana
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: IEP Goal Drafter
seeds.description: A seed app that drafts measurable IEP goals in standard format as a starting point for the IEP team. Upload your district's goal bank for consistent language and structure across your school. Always double check.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Socratic Discussion Partner
seeds.description: A seed app that guides critical thinking through probing questions — never giving answers or taking sides. Use it for debate prep, essay planning, or deep exploration of any topic.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Language Practice Partner
seeds.description: A seed app for conversational practice in a new language with gentle corrections and encouragement. Enable Voice Input and Output for a real speaking and listening experience.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Writing Feedback Coach
seeds.description: A seed app that generates strengths-based writing feedback teachers can share directly with students. Upload your rubric to align feedback to your exact grading criteria.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Vocabulary Builder
seeds.description: A seed app that teaches vocabulary through context, examples, and interactive quizzes. Upload your unit word list so definitions match exactly what's taught in class.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Career Explorer
seeds.description: A seed app that helps students discover careers matching their interests and values. Upload your school's course catalog so the AI can recommend specific next steps available at the student's school.
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App

seeds.name: Quiz & Review Partner
seeds.description: A seed app that quizzes students, tracks their score, and identifies what they need to study more. Upload a study guide to generate questions aligned to the actual test
seeds.creator: 🌱 Seed App
